sigWerErrors.reason: 'Hesap ekstresi' (account statement) and 'mesafe ekstresi' (distance statement) are completely different concepts, changing the meaning of the request.
'İstediğim' (what I requested) and 'Henüz' (yet) are different words and change the structure of the sentence, but the overall meaning (the statement hasn't arrived yet) is still understandable.
Both are forms of 'can you' (singular vs. plural/formal), so the meaning is preserved.
